![Optum nurse smiling ](https://www.optum.com/content/dam/optum-dam/images/corporate/home/health-care-you-can-count-on.jpg)![Optum nurse smiling ](https://www.optum.com/content/dam/optum-dam/images/corporate/home/health-care-you-can-count-on-mobile.jpg)

# Health care you can count on

- [![](https://www.optum.com/content/dam/optum4/iconography-resources/medical/Icon_Stethoscope_RGB.svg)\\
Find care near you](https://www.optum.com/en/care/locations.html)
- [![](https://www.optum.com/content/dam/optum4/iconography-resources/finance/Icon_DigitalWallet_RGB.svg)\\
Pay a medical bill](https://www.optum.com/en/care/bill-pay.html)
- [![](https://www.optum.com/content/dam/optum4/iconography-resources/finance/Icon_PiggyBank_RGB.svg)\\

![Woman making Rx payment on laptop ](https://www.optum.com/content/dam/optum-dam/images/corporate/home/woman-making-rx-payment-on-laptop.jpg)

Health care information

## Visit your patient portal

Make payments, submit copays, see your billing statements, view test results, schedule appointments and message your care team.

[Find your portal by state](https://www.optum.com/en/care/patient-portals.html)

Health finances

## Make your health care dollars go further

Youâll be surprised at all the everyday health items you can buy with your HSA and FSA card â saving up to 30% with pretax dollars.

[See where you can shop and save](https://www.optum.com/en/financial-services/learn/hsa-fsa-payment-card.html)

![Woman checking out at pharmacy ](https://www.optum.com/content/dam/optum-dam/images/corporate/home/woman-checking-out-at-pharmacy.jpg)

![Dad and daughter at home](https://www.optum.com/content/dam/optum-dam/images/corporate/home/father-watching-daughter-jump-on-couch.jpg)

Online pharmacy

## Youâve got better things to do than stand in line at the pharmacy

Optum Home Delivery Pharmacy brings your medications directly to your door and gives you 24/7 access to our licensed pharmacists â ready to answer any question.

[Learn about Home Delivery](https://www.optum.com/en/pharmacy-services/medication-delivery.html)

Health and wellness


## A healthier you happens here

Find tips, ideas and information to inspire healthy living at any age, including topics important to you and your family.

![](https://hc-visit.optum.com/content/dam/content-ecosystem/healthier-you/raw-images/mod-hlthu-335_HSA_max-contribution_1200x800.jpg)

Health care finances


### HSA max contribution, explained

Every year, the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) sets a contribution limit for everyone with a health savings account (HSA). It's the maximum amount of money you can put into the account for that calendar year.

[Read more](https://www.optum.com/en/health-articles.html/health-care-finances/hsa-max-contribution-explained)

![](https://hc-visit.optum.com/content/dam/content-ecosystem/healthier-you/raw-images/health-conditions/getahandleonyourchronicskinproblems-web-1200x800-72_5.jpg)

Healthy living


### How to handle your summer skin problems

Warm weather can pose unique risks for people who have skin conditions. Hereâs how to help protect your skin and still have fun in the sun.

[Read more](https://www.optum.com/en/health-articles.html/healthy-living/how-get-handle-your-summer-skin-problems)

![](https://hc-visit.optum.com/content/dam/content-ecosystem/healthier-you/raw-images/your-care-team-your-care/whattypewellnessvisitrightforme-web-1200x800-72_13.jpg)

Healthy living


### Your age-by-age guide to annual physical exams

You should see your doctor often, no matter how old you are. But what happens during those visits changes as you get older. Hereâs what to know.

[Read more](https://www.optum.com/en/health-articles.html/healthy-living/your-age-guide-annual-checkups)

[Read more wellness articles](https://www.optum.com/content/optum5/en/health-articles.html)

WeâreÂ helpingÂ solveÂ the challenges in healthcareÂ with a bold and optimistic outlook.

Join us

Check out current career opportunities to discover how you can start caring, connecting and growing â together with Optum.

Whether itâs about health care, financial or pharmacy-related services, weâll help you find the answer you need.

target_content:
Skip To ContentSkip To Search

Online Pharmacy and Home Delivery

# Online Pharmacy & HomeÂ Delivery

## Save Time with Home Delivery

**_$0 Delivery fee until 12/31/2026.\*_**

The ultimate in convenience! Save time with a prescription delivery directly to your mailbox, anywhere in the United States. Whether youâre a snowbird for the winter or simply prefer the convenience, prescription delivery is just one more way we can deliver the incredible service you expect.

- Standard Delivery for $1 per shipment (exclusions may apply), 5-7 business days
- Home Delivery is self-serve and can be changed by clicking the link in your Review Order text message

_\*Other fees may apply. Terms apply._

![Wegmans veggies](https://images.wegmans.com/is/image/wegmanscsprod/6997458-1200x755-Mailbox-1?fmt=webp-alpha)![Wegmans veggies](https://images.wegmans.com/is/image/wegmanscsprod/6997458-1200x755-Mailbox-1?fmt=webp-alpha)

## How to Choose Home Delivery for Prescriptions

- ![Step 1: Click the link](https://images.wegmans.com/is/image/wegmanscsprod/6847893-Phones-SignUp-1-r2-1?wid=400&hei=400&fit=crop&fmt=webp-alpha)



Step 1: Click the link









Click the link in your refill reminder or autofill message orÂ **text HOME to 67056**.

- ![Step 2: Choose your prescription refills](https://images.wegmans.com/is/image/wegmanscsprod/6847893-Phones-SignUp-2-r2?wid=400&hei=400&fit=crop&fmt=webp-alpha)



Step 2: Choose your prescription refills









SelectÂ **Home Delivery**Â orÂ **Pickup in Store**Â for each of your prescriptions. Your selection will turn green and a checkmark will appear beside it. Items that cannot be delivered will sayÂ **Not Eligible for Home Delivery.\***

- ![Step 3: Save your selections](https://images.wegmans.com/is/image/wegmanscsprod/6847893-Phones-SignUp-3-r2?wid=400&hei=400&fit=crop&fmt=webp-alpha)



Step 3: Save your selections









ClickÂ **SAVE AND CONTINUE**Â once you have selected a delivery preference for each prescription. Your delivery preferences have been saved for future orders (you have the option to change these at any time).

- ![Step 4: Review and submit](https://images.wegmans.com/is/image/wegmanscsprod/6847893-Phones-SignUp-4-r2-1?wid=400&hei=400&fit=crop&fmt=webp-alpha)



Step 4: Review and submit









Review your order summary to verify that everything looks correct, thenÂ **click SUBMIT ORDER.**Â Done!


_\*Home Delivery exclusions may include controlled substances, refrigerated products, bulky items, etc._

* * *

## Helpful Text Alerts

Want to know when your prescriptions are ready? Need to change your order? Our FREE Text Alerts keep you in the loop and in control for maximum efficiencyâno wasted trips or surprises! Sign up on yourÂ [Wegmans Pharmacy Online Account](https://wegmans.web.medrefill.com/wgweb/#/account)Â or stop by your storeâs pharmacy to ask our team for assistance.

- ![Prescription Received](https://images.wegmans.com/is/image/wegmanscsprod/6847893-1200x1200-TextAlerts-PrescriptionReceived-1?wid=400&hei=400&fit=crop&fmt=webp-alpha)



Prescription Received









No more guessing if your doctor sent your script! Weâll text you when we receive a new electronic prescription from your provider and include a link to track its progress.

- ![Refill Reminders](https://images.wegmans.com/is/image/wegmanscsprod/6847893-1200x1200-TextAlerts-RefillReminders?wid=400&hei=400&fit=crop&fmt=webp-alpha)



Refill Reminders









Weâll notify you when weâre planning for upcoming refills.

- ![Order Updates](https://images.wegmans.com/is/image/wegmanscsprod/6847893-1200x1200-TextAlerts-OrderUpdates-r1-1?wid=400&hei=400&fit=crop&fmt=webp-alpha)



Order Updates









Weâll inform you when your order is ready or delayed and provide delivery/pickup details and cost.

- ![Modify Your Order](https://images.wegmans.com/is/image/wegmanscsprod/6847893-1200x1200-TextAlerts-ModifyYourOrder-1?wid=400&hei=400&fit=crop&fmt=webp-alpha)



Modify Your Order









Easily add or remove items in your order, reschedule the reminder, and choose home delivery or pickup.


_Certain phone charges may apply. This free service can be started and ended at any time._

* * *

## Manage Your Prescriptions Online

We help our customers live healthier, better lives by making it easy to get prescription meds and more. Did you know that you can manage your prescriptions and preferences online? From convenient home delivery to text message reminders, you can manage your medications your way.

![Manage Your Prescriptions Online](https://images.wegmans.com/is/image/wegmanscsprod/1180x742-pharmacy-online-1?fmt=webp-alpha)![Manage Your Prescriptions Online](https://images.wegmans.com/is/image/wegmanscsprod/1180x742-pharmacy-online-1?fmt=webp-alpha)

#### We make it easy to:

- Fill prescriptions
- [Schedule immunization appointments](https://chat.eh.care/4f5bf782d0104a79856ab6c2b2e03037)Â (or walk in anytime!)
- Manage prescriptions for family members and others (dependents, partners, elders, pets)
- Adjust notification preferences and how you receive your prescriptions
- Print your prescription purchase summary

[Get Started(opens in a new window)](https://wegmans.web.medrefill.com/wgweb/#/prescription)

**Please Note:** First-time Pharmacy Online account users will need to have their identity validated. The personal identity verification check is administered by our trusted business partner ExperianÂ®. Itâs a one-time process that involves answering specific questions, ensuring the person attempting to access your pharmacy information truly is you.

* * *

![Never Run Out of Refills](https://images.wegmans.com/is/image/wegmanscsprod/auto-refill-1?fmt=webp-alpha)![Never Run Out of Refills](https://images.wegmans.com/is/image/wegmanscsprod/auto-refill-1?fmt=webp-alpha)

## Never Run Out of Refills

When youâre on your last fill, weâll request a new prescription from your doctor, so you never run out of refills.

#### Easy Ways to Fill Your Prescriptions

- Refill Reminders help you plan ahead so you never run out
- Autofill: If youâre enrolled in Text Alerts, weâll send a reminder before you run out. The link in the message lets you make any necessary changes; otherwise, weâll text you when your order has shipped or is ready.
- [Refill with Rx number online](https://wegmans.web.medrefill.com/wgweb/#/refill)
- Refill with Rx number by calling the pharmacy
- Text your Rx number to 67056

* * *

#### Set Up Your Mail Order Benefit

If you are a member of Excellus, Univera, CDPHPâ¯or Independent Health Association (IHA) and you have a mail order benefit as part of your health plan, please call us at the following numbers for help getting set up. If you are unsure if you have a mail order benefit, please contact your health plan.

Excellus/Univera: 800-586-6910â¯\| CDPHP: 1-844-328-2550â¯\| IHA: 888-205-8573

No delivery fee for standard shipping.

Questions?Â [View our Pharmacy Online FAQs](https://www.wegmans.com/service/faq/pharmacy)

Our website uses cookies and other technologies to help it function and give you the best Wegmans experience. For more information, see our [Privacy Policy](https://www.wegmans.com/privacy). By accessing or using our website, you agree to our updated [Terms & Conditions](https://www.wegmans.com/terms).

outreach_email.body: At Optum, we're committed to delivering comprehensive, integrated health services that combine care, finance, and pharmacy. Our Home Delivery Pharmacy brings your medications directly to your door and gives you 24/7 access to licensed pharmacists. With $0 delivery fee until 12/31/2026, you can save time and money. Learn how to choose Home Delivery for your prescriptions on our website.
